goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 21:30' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 21:30 and should depart from broxbourne
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and attraction type
